steps.title: Identify what initial deposit means
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance at time zero. In function notation, this is $f(0)$, which is the $y$-intercept of the line—where the line crosses the $y$-axis at $x = 0$.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept directly from the graph
steps.content: At $x = 0$ (the left edge of the graph where the $y$-axis is), the line crosses the $y$-axis at $y = 40$ dollars. This is the initial deposit estimated by the graph: 40 dollars.
